title: Flow with It (You Got Me Feeling Like)

lines.text: Is the way that I move with you
Is the way that my body grooves
Can we persuade our hips to lose
All of the time inside our room
You got me feeling like I can't hold you
We ain't gonna fight, let's flow with it
This feeling I have inside
Is it my lips that long for you
Is the heart that break in two
Can we use all this drugs we use
Just tryin to always confuse it
You got me feeling like I can't hold you
We ain't gonna fight, let's flow with it
This feeling I have inside now
You got me feeling like I can't hold you
We ain't gonna fight, let's just flow with it
You got me feeling, you got me feeling, you got me feeling
Can't hold you, I can't hold you, baby
We ain't gonna, we ain't gonna fight, we ain't gonna fight , we ain't gonna fight
Let's just flow with it
